title: L.A. Tournament
overview: In search of the 48 secret techniques, Mikoshiarashi travels to L.A. where his attire gets him in trouble immediately. Thankfully, he is saved by the master of distortion rock, Breaky, who might have a thing or two to teach the young sumo wrestler...

title: Montreal Tournament
overview: Hitchhiking up north in Canada, Arashi-kun passes out in a sudden blizzard, but is saved by the girlfriend of Canadian Ice Hockey Star Justin.

title: New York Tournament
overview: Tricked by a taxi cab driver, Arashi-kun is in dire need of money, stranded in the middle of New York City. With no where else to turn, he enters a funky dance contest, only to find that the local dance legend, Bootsy, may hold the secret to one of the 48 techniques...

title: Cleveland Tournament
overview: Arashi is scouted by the manager for the New York Nyankees for his amazing arm, and the home run king of the Cleveland Iideyansu, Rodry, is seriously mad at having his spotlight taken away.

title: D.C. Tournament
overview: While visiting the White House, Arashi is mistakenly arrested for being the ringleader of a terrorist organization. But thanks to his keen eye, he helps Edgar, the nation's top FBI watchdog, apprehend the real mastermind.

title: Mexico Tournament
overview: After being introduced to the wonders of tequila at a Mexican bar, Arashi is taken in by a mysterious masked wrestler who recruits Arashi as his new partner.

title: Cuba Tournament
overview: Still feeling quite happy after his Mexican wrestling adventure, Arashi talks back to a Cuban military patrol and is thrown into jail along with other political prisoners. Never giving up hope, they wait for the day their hero, Guevaran, will lead an attack to rescue them...

title: Jamaica Tournament
overview: Impressed by the sites and tastes of the island, Arashi is faced with a choice between two restaurants. But it seems the entire country is on the verge of a civil war between two political parties.

title: Amazon Tournament
overview: Hearing news of a mysterious hermit that lives deep in the Amazon Jungle, Arashi goes to see him in search of another one of the 48 techniques.

title: Columbia Tournament
overview: In a rush to get to the airport, Arashi gets on the wrong bus. When that bus breaks down near a coffee plantation, Arashi heads to a famous local coffee shop.

title: Argentina Tournament
overview: Arashi is looking forward to getting on board a cruise ship, but all the tickets are sold out. With no where else to turn, he offers to help out a young man who says he knows the captain of the ship, but...

title: Caribbean Sea Tournament
overview: Enjoying his Atlantic cruise, Arashi hears rumors of a vicious pirate named Hawk who has been attacking ships. There's no way he'd actually attack this ship though...

title: Atlantic Ocean Tournament
overview: Having successfully beaten off the pirates, Arashi is back on his way to Europe. But Captain Hawk wants revenge! Arashi and the rest of the ship is saved at the last moment by a gallant explorer...

title: Pamplona Tournament
overview: Arriving finally in Europe, Arashi is transfixed by all the beautiful women. Catching one, on the other hand, proves to be quite a challenge...

title: Barcelona Tournament
overview: Back in Japan, Arashi's rival Tetsunishiki is racking up wins in the sumo world. A mysterious architect helps Arashi regain his motivation to keep going on his quest to become the greatest sumo wrestler in the world.

title: Paris Tournament
overview: Arashi becomes quick pals with Emperor Napoleonne, and offers to help him invade Italy by crossing the Alps. Thanks to their indomitable spirit, they overcome the shear ludicrousness of the concept and somehow emerge victorious.

title: Paris Collection Tournament
overview: Arashi confronts a man secretly taking pictures of him around Paris, and it turns out he's a budding photographer who's just really shy. Arashi offers to be his practice subject, and gets scouted to be the next top model.

title: Bourgogne Tournament
overview: Arashi sits down for a nice full course French meal, but seems to not understand how to properly savor the experience. At a local winery, he learns the secret to using all 5 of his sense...

title: London Tournament
overview: After running into a funny, boy-like character in a London pub, Arashi is taken to "pure heart land," an island where kids never grow up. But just as he arrives, the evil Captain Hoo-kun appears...

title: Scotland Tournament
overview: Outside a stately mansion, Arashi is caught up in a murder investigation.

title: Stuttgart Tournament
overview: Entering Germany for the first time, Arashi feels like having a beer, but gets in a car accident while trying to save a puppy. Arashi is fine, but the car is another story...

title: Alps Tournament
overview: Arashi meets up with a small girl and helps her carry some heavy bags back to her cabin in the Alps. Inside the cabin, however, is a familiar face...

title: Switzerland Tournament
overview: Arashi's in Switzerland, the land of banks, but plum out of cash. Heading to a bank to withdraw some money, Arashi is caught up in an attempted robbery, and meets Meister, a master Swiss watchmaker. Meister helps Arashi with a complete tune-up: Of both his watch, and his body.

title: Austria Tournament
overview: Arashi is invited to a feast at the Austrian court in honor of his victory at the Champion's Tournament, and he runs into the world's greatest composer, Mozun. The ever polite Arashi is asked to help teach Mozun some manners, but ends up becoming the inspiration for his latest symphony instead.

title: Sweden Tournament
overview: Arashi is going for a walk in Sweden when suddenly a nearby house explodes! Sir Nobelson, a scientist inventor, has finally completed his greatest invention, dynamite, to help his friend finish building a tunnel. But there are people who would use such power for evil in this world...

title: Finland Tournament
overview: Arashi is in Finland on Christmas Eve, when he happens upon Santa's workshop! Arashi is eager to help deliver presents but Santa seems somewhat different than how he had imagined him to be...

title: Russia Tournament
overview: Arashi goes for a swim in a heated pool to warm up from the cold of the Moscow's winter, when he encounters a group of synchronized swimmers. The leader of the group, Elschenko, tries to recruit Arashi into the group, but he thinks the sport is too feminine. Arashi soon learns that displays of grace require incredible strength out of sight.

title: Romania Tournament
overview: Arashi is lost in a dark forest somewhere in Romania, when he comes across a kind young woman who offers to let him rest in her house. It seems that she's just happy to finally have a visitor she can talk to...

title: Greece Tournament
overview: Arashi pays a visit to the Parthenon and stumbles upon a meeting of the gods. Sent as a representative of humanity to Hades, Arashi must convince Hadus, the lord of the underworld, that humanity is worth saving. This might be one bout Arashi can't win through force...

title: Turkey Tournament
overview: Arashi ventures into Istanbul, where he heads to a local sauna for a bath. But he runs into the divine oily god of Turkish Sumo, Ozman. Which Sumo with rein supreme?! Watch out, Arashi...

title: Egypt Tournament
overview: Arashi is wandering in the desert, desperately searching for some water, when he comes across some giant pyramids being built. He helps with the construction in exchange for some water, and meets King Phara-oh. But when Cleonpatran shows up, Phara-oh runs off for some reason...

title: Kenya Tournament
overview: Arashi marvels at the natural beauty of the savanna, that is, until a lion almost eats him! Saved by the head of the local village, Elmoran, Arashi helps hunt Big Daddy, a giant lion that's been attacking people.

title: Thailand Tournament
overview: Arashi arrives in Thailand, and gets picked up by a tour guide in a Tuk-Tuk taxi. After seeing a giant Buddha and riding an elephant, he's taken to see some Thai boxing.

title: Mongolia Tournament
overview: Arashi finds himself in Mongolia, a rival country in the sport of sumo wrestling, but something seems amiss in the village. It seems a single man has been going around challenging all the villages to a sumo bout with the entire village on the line! Arashi heads out to stop this person, and to learn from a powerful foe.

title: China Tournament
overview: Arashi is in China, and is mistaken for Zhuge Liang by Liu Long and his followers Fei Chang and Yu Guan. Arashi volunteers to go to ask QiÃ„?n Sun to form an alliance with Liu Long in order to defeat the evil Chancellor Cao CÃ„?ng CÃ„?ng.

title: Macao Tournament
overview: Arashi is drawn to the glittering lights of Macao's casinos, and runs into an old friend, Badri! The two of them get on a huge winning streak, and attract the attention of the owner of the casino, the genius gambler Hoho, who invites Arashi for a personal duel...
